tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsAnnotationSpecSetsCreate
tools.description: Creates an annotation spec set by providing a set of labels.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsAnnotationSpecSetsList
tools.description: Lists annotation spec sets for a project. Pagination is supported.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsDatasetsAnnotatedDatasetsExamplesList
tools.description: Lists examples in an annotated dataset. Pagination is supported.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsDatasetsAnnotatedDatasetsFeedbackThreadsFeedbackMessagesCreate
tools.description: Create a FeedbackMessage object.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsDatasetsAnnotatedDatasetsFeedbackThreadsFeedbackMessagesList
tools.description: List FeedbackMessages with pagination.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsDatasetsAnnotatedDatasetsFeedbackThreadsList
tools.description: List FeedbackThreads with pagination.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsDatasetsAnnotatedDatasetsList
tools.description: Lists annotated datasets for a dataset. Pagination is supported.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsDatasetsCreate
tools.description: Creates dataset. If success return a Dataset resource.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsDatasetsDataItemsList
tools.description: Lists data items in a dataset. This API can be called after data are imported into dataset. Pagination is supported.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsDatasetsEvaluationsExampleComparisonsSearch
tools.description: Searches example comparisons from an evaluation. The return format is a list of example comparisons that show ground truth and prediction(s) for a single input. Search by providing an evaluation ID.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsDatasetsExportData
tools.description: Exports data and annotations from dataset.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsDatasetsImageLabel
tools.description: Starts a labeling task for image. The type of image labeling task is configured by feature in the request.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsDatasetsImportData
tools.description: Imports data into dataset based on source locations defined in request. It can be called multiple times for the same dataset. Each dataset can only have one long running operation running on it. For example, no labeling task (also long running operation) can be started while importing is still ongoing. Vice versa.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsDatasetsList
tools.description: Lists datasets under a project. Pagination is supported.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsDatasetsTextLabel
tools.description: Starts a labeling task for text. The type of text labeling task is configured by feature in the request.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsDatasetsVideoLabel
tools.description: Starts a labeling task for video. The type of video labeling task is configured by feature in the request.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsEvaluationJobsCreate
tools.description: Creates an evaluation job.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsEvaluationJobsList
tools.description: Lists all evaluation jobs within a project with possible filters. Pagination is supported.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsEvaluationJobsPatch
tools.description: Updates an evaluation job. You can only update certain fields of the job's EvaluationJobConfig: `humanAnnotationConfig.instruction`, `exampleCount`, and `exampleSamplePercentage`. If you want to change any other aspect of the evaluation job, you must delete the job and create a new one.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsEvaluationJobsPause
tools.description: Pauses an evaluation job. Pausing an evaluation job that is already in a `PAUSED` state is a no-op.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsEvaluationJobsResume
tools.description: Resumes a paused evaluation job. A deleted evaluation job can't be resumed. Resuming a running or scheduled evaluation job is a no-op.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsEvaluationsSearch
tools.description: Searches evaluations within a project.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsInstructionsCreate
tools.description: Creates an instruction for how data should be labeled.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsInstructionsList
tools.description: Lists instructions for a project. Pagination is supported.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsOperationsCancel
tools.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsOperationsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a long-running operation. This method indicates that the client is no longer interested in the operation result. It does not cancel the operation. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsOperationsGet
tools.description: Gets the latest state of a long-running operation. Clients can use this method to poll the operation result at intervals as recommended by the API service.

tools.name: projects.datalabelingProjectsOperationsList
tools.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`. NOTE: the `name` binding allows API services to override the binding to use different resource name schemes, such as `users/*/operations`. To override the binding, API services can add a binding such as `"/v1/{name=users/*}/operations"` to their service configuration. For backwards compatibility, the default name includes the operations collection id, however overriding users must ensure the name binding is the parent resource, without the operations collection id.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
